title: First, Break All the Rules: What the World's Greatest Managers Do Differently
subtitle: What the World's Greatest Managers Do Differently
rationale: Foundational book on strengths-based management and employee engagement, based on Gallup's landmark 80,000-manager study. Introduces the Q12 survey instrument that became the global standard for measuring workplace engagement. Chosen as the root book because it defines the modern I-O psychology approach to performance management and leadership development.
